task_completion.description: Access the NextGen Connect server and authenticate as admin.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the NextGen Connect login screen, dashboard, or an API client/script targeting https://localhost:8443 with credentials 'admin' and 'admin'.

task_completion.description: Input the required basic user details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a user creation form or API payload containing Username: 'monitor_analyst', First Name: 'Sarah', and Last Name: 'Chen'.

task_completion.description: Input the required contact and organizational details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a user creation form or API payload containing Email: 'sarah.chen@mercygeneral.org', Organization: 'Mercy General Hospital', and Description: 'Integration monitoring analyst'.
Look for the password 'M0nitor2024!Secure' being entered into the password/confirmation fields or included in the API payload (may be URL-encoded as %21 for the '!').

task_completion.description: Include the required OpenAPI header if using the REST API.
task_completion.visual_evidence: If the agent uses the GUI, award these points automatically. If the agent uses the REST API (e.g., curl, Postman, Python), look for the header 'X-Requested-With: OpenAPI' in the request.

task_completion.description: Successfully save or submit the new user account.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Save' button being clicked, the new user 'monitor_analyst' appearing in the Users list in the GUI, or a successful HTTP response (e.g., 200/201 OK) from the API submission.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual application or a genuine API client.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the screenshots show the NextGen Connect interface, a terminal running curl/scripts, or an API tool like Postman, rather than just typing the expected values into a text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent targeted the correct server address.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check the browser address bar or API request URL to ensure it is exactly https://localhost:8443.

integrity.description: Verify that a real submission occurred and wasn't faked.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for genuine system feedback after submission, such as the UI updating to show the new user in the list, or a real JSON response from the server, rather than just a printed string in a terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a user on NextGen Connect (https://localhost:8443). Expected values: Username: 'monitor_analyst', First Name: 'Sarah', Last Name: 'Chen', Email: 'sarah.chen@mercygeneral.org', Organization: 'Mercy General Hospital', Password: 'M0nitor2024!Secure'. If the REST API is used (e.g., POST /api/users), the header 'X-Requested-With: OpenAPI' must be present. The password contains a special character ('!') which might be URL-encoded as '%21' in some API scripts.
